_doc: State file written by the Fireflies → PPL Dash auto-ingest scheduled task. Tracks which transcripts have been processed so re-runs are idempotent. Do not edit by hand unless you know what you're doing.
lastRunMessage: No new ground lessons matching the title regex `^Ground lesson \d+\b` since last run. Window scanned: 14 days from 2026-04-21, 20 transcripts retrieved. Title-matching transcripts found: GL3 (2026-04-21, id 01KPS8BYBGNYVZF84AFK0EX9VD) and GL4 (2026-04-24, id 01KQ11RQGTTD1TVDJNDZ3TXQMZ) — both already in state. NOTE: transcript 01KQXBR03YYE6NRPPFGDRHERG1 dated 2026-05-05 17:41 PT (108 min, Aryan-only, no meeting link) has content that strongly suggests Ground Lesson 5 — covers stall aerodynamics, power-on/power-off stall procedures, PARE spin recovery, mixture leaning above 3000 ft, ACS standards, KSNA traffic-pattern stall/spin risks. Title is the Fireflies default 'May 05, 05:41 PM' — does NOT match the regex, so skipped per strict filter rules. ACTION FOR ARYAN: if this is GL5, rename it in Fireflies to 'Ground lesson 5 May 05, 05:41 PM' (or similar), then re-run the sync. Remaining 18 transcripts are SkyAccess work meetings (JetNet, AMSTAT, FetchAir, TrueSkies, FlyingZebra, AirAlsie, OKR/negotiation training, etc.) plus 2 personal (Private Chef, Laguna Beach house) — non-matching. No edits, no commit.
